options.content: (2) QUANTUM CHANNEL NOISE
(1) PHYSICAL CHANNEL PARAMETERS

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
    CONCAT('R', r.numero_ronda) AS `Round`,

    CASE
        WHEN r.reconciliacion_hash_match = 1 THEN 'HASH OK'
        WHEN r.reconciliacion_hash_match = 0 THEN 'HASH FAIL'
        WHEN r.ronda_abortada = 1
             AND r.qber_verificacion IS NOT NULL
             AND c.qber_abort_threshold IS NOT NULL
             AND r.qber_verificacion > c.qber_abort_threshold THEN 'N/A: HIGH QBER'
        WHEN r.ronda_abortada = 1 THEN 'N/A'
        ELSE 'PENDING'
    END AS `Confirmation`,

    CASE
        WHEN r.reconciliacion_ok = 1 THEN 'Round accepted'
        WHEN r.reconciliacion_ok = 0 THEN 'Round discarded by reconciliation'
        WHEN r.ronda_abortada = 1
             AND r.qber_verificacion > c.qber_abort_threshold THEN 'Round aborted by QBER'
        WHEN r.ronda_abortada = 2 THEN 'Round in progress'
        ELSE 'Pending'
    END AS `Result`,

    r.bits_post_qber AS `Checked bits`,
    r.bits_post_reconciliacion AS `Accepted bits`

FROM BB84_rondas r
JOIN BB84_configuracion c
    ON c.id_configuracion = r.id_configuracion
WHERE r.id_configuracion IN (${Session:csv})
ORDER BY r.id_configuracion DESC, r.numero_ronda DESC;

SELECT
    CONCAT(c.distancia_km, ' km') AS `Distance`
FROM BB84_configuracion c
WHERE c.id_configuracion = ${Session:raw};

SELECT
    CONCAT(c.atenuacion_db_km, ' dB/km') AS `Attenuation`
FROM BB84_configuracion c
WHERE c.id_configuracion = ${Session:raw};

SELECT
    CONCAT(ROUND(c.prob_loss_in * 100, 2), ' %') AS `Initial loss`
FROM BB84_configuracion c
WHERE c.id_configuracion = ${Session:raw};

SELECT
    CONCAT(c.velocidad_fibra_km_s, ' km/s') AS `Speed`
FROM BB84_configuracion c
WHERE c.id_configuracion = ${Session:raw};

options.content: (3) PHYSICAL IMPERFECTIONS

spec.rawSql:
WITH claves AS (
    SELECT
        key_id,
        MAX(alice_value) AS alice_value,
        MAX(bob_value) AS bob_value,
        MAX(fecha_alice) AS fecha_alice,
        MAX(fecha_bob) AS fecha_bob,
        COALESCE(MAX(fecha_bob), MAX(fecha_alice)) AS fecha_clave
    FROM (
        SELECT
            a.key_id,
            a.key_value AS alice_value,
            NULL AS bob_value,
            a.created_at AS fecha_alice,
            NULL AS fecha_bob
        FROM QKD_keys_alice a

        UNION ALL

        SELECT
            b.key_id,
            NULL AS alice_value,
            b.key_value AS bob_value,
            NULL AS fecha_alice,
            b.created_at AS fecha_bob
        FROM QKD_keys_bob b
    ) t
    GROUP BY key_id
),

claves_numeradas AS (
    SELECT
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY fecha_clave ASC) AS numero_clave,
        key_id,
        alice_value,
        bob_value,
        fecha_alice,
        fecha_bob,
        fecha_clave
    FROM claves
)

SELECT
    numero_clave AS `Session`,

    DATE_FORMAT(fecha_clave, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS `Date`,

    key_id AS `Key ID`,

    LEFT(alice_value, 24) AS `Alice`,

    CASE
        WHEN alice_value IS NULL THEN 'NO ALICE'
        WHEN bob_value IS NULL THEN 'NO BOB'
        WHEN alice_value = bob_value THEN 'EQUAL'
        ELSE 'DIFFERENT'
    END AS `Result`,

    LEFT(bob_value, 24) AS `Bob`

FROM claves_numeradas

ORDER BY fecha_clave DESC
LIMIT 50;

options.content: (4) DETECTOR AND MEASUREMENT ERRORS
(5) EVE

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
    'DEPHASE' AS `Parameter`,
    IF(c.usar_dephase = 1, 'Active', 'Inactive') AS `Status`,
    CONCAT(ROUND(c.despolarizacion * 100, 2), ' %') AS `Value`
FROM BB84_configuracion c
WHERE c.id_configuracion IN (${Session:csv});

SELECT
    'ENERGY RELAXATION TIME' AS `Parameter`,
    IF(c.usart1t2_noise = 1, 'Active', 'Inactive') AS `Status`,
    CONCAT(ROUND(c.T1_ns, 2), ' ns') AS `Value`
FROM BB84_configuracion c
WHERE c.id_configuracion IN (${Session:csv})

UNION ALL

SELECT
    'DEPHASING TIME',
    IF(c.usart1t2_noise = 1, 'Active', 'Inactive'),
    CONCAT(ROUND(c.T2_ns, 2), ' ns')
FROM BB84_configuracion c
WHERE c.id_configuracion IN (${Session:csv});

SELECT
    'Measurement ERROR for 0' AS `Parameter`,
    IF(c.usar_measure_faulty = 1, 'Active', 'Inactive') AS `Status`,
    CONCAT(ROUND(c.prob_error_medicion_0 * 100, 2), ' %') AS `Value`
FROM BB84_configuracion c
WHERE c.id_configuracion IN (${Session:csv})

UNION ALL

SELECT
    'Measurement ERROR for 1',
    IF(c.usar_measure_faulty = 1, 'Active', 'Inactive'),
    CONCAT(ROUND(c.prob_error_medicion_1 * 100, 2), ' %')
FROM BB84_configuracion c
WHERE c.id_configuracion IN (${Session:csv});

spec.title: Dark counts and measurement errors BY ROUND

spec.rawSql:
SELECT 
    CONCAT('R', r.numero_ronda) AS `Round`,

    COALESCE(r.dark_counts_generados, 0) AS `Generated dark counts`,

    COALESCE(r.errores_measure_faulty, 0) AS `Measurement errors`

FROM BB84_rondas r

JOIN (
    SELECT
        id_configuracion,
        MIN(numero_ronda) AS primera_ronda,
        MAX(numero_ronda) AS ultima_ronda,
        GREATEST(
            1,
            CEIL(COUNT(*) / 25.0)
        ) AS paso
    FROM BB84_rondas
    WHERE id_configuracion IN (${Session:csv})
    GROUP BY id_configuracion
) m
    ON m.id_configuracion = r.id_configuracion

WHERE r.id_configuracion IN (${Session:csv})
  AND (
        MOD(r.numero_ronda - m.primera_ronda, m.paso) = 0
        OR r.numero_ronda = m.ultima_ronda
      )

ORDER BY r.id_configuracion ASC, r.numero_ronda ASC;

spec.title: Dark counts and measurement errors BY ROUND

spec.rawSql:
SELECT 
    CONCAT('R', r.numero_ronda) AS `Round`,

    COALESCE(r.dark_counts_generados, 0) AS `Generated dark counts`,

    COALESCE(r.errores_measure_faulty, 0) AS `Measurement errors`

FROM BB84_rondas r

JOIN (
    SELECT
        id_configuracion,
        MIN(numero_ronda) AS primera_ronda,
        MAX(numero_ronda) AS ultima_ronda,
        GREATEST(
            1,
            CEIL(COUNT(*) / 25.0)
        ) AS paso
    FROM BB84_rondas
    WHERE id_configuracion IN (${Session:csv})
    GROUP BY id_configuracion
) m
    ON m.id_configuracion = r.id_configuracion

WHERE r.id_configuracion IN (${Session:csv})
  AND (
        MOD(r.numero_ronda - m.primera_ronda, m.paso) = 0
        OR r.numero_ronda = m.ultima_ronda
      )

ORDER BY r.id_configuracion ASC, r.numero_ronda ASC;

spec.title: Dark counts and measurement errors BY ROUND

spec.rawSql:
SELECT 
    CONCAT('R', r.numero_ronda) AS `Round`,

    COALESCE(r.errores_misalignment, 0) AS `Misalignment errors`,

    COALESCE(r.qubits_perdidos_jitter, 0) AS `Qubits lost by jitter`

FROM BB84_rondas r

JOIN (
    SELECT
        id_configuracion,
        MIN(numero_ronda) AS primera_ronda,
        GREATEST(
            1,
            CEIL(COUNT(*) / 25.0)
        ) AS paso
    FROM BB84_rondas
    WHERE id_configuracion IN (${Session:csv})
    GROUP BY id_configuracion
) m
    ON m.id_configuracion = r.id_configuracion

WHERE r.id_configuracion IN (${Session:csv})
  AND MOD(r.numero_ronda - m.primera_ronda, m.paso) = 0

ORDER BY r.id_configuracion ASC, r.numero_ronda ASC;

spec.title: Dark counts and measurement errors BY ROUND

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
    CONCAT('R', r.numero_ronda) AS `Round`,

    r.errores_misalignment AS `Misalignment errors`,

    r.qubits_perdidos_jitter AS `Qubits lost by jitter`

FROM BB84_rondas r
WHERE r.id_configuracion IN (${Session:csv})
ORDER BY r.id_configuracion DESC, r.numero_ronda ASC;

SELECT
    c.timestamp_inicio AS time,

    c.tiempo_total_sesion AS `Total session time (s)`,

    CONCAT(
        '(S', c.id_configuracion, ') ',
        'Rounds: ', c.total_rondas
    ) AS metric

FROM BB84_configuracion c
JOIN BB84_rondas r
    ON r.id_configuracion = c.id_configuracion

WHERE c.estado = 'completada'
  AND c.tiempo_total_sesion IS NOT NULL
  AND r.qber_verificacion IS NOT NULL

GROUP BY
    c.id_configuracion,
    c.timestamp_inicio,
    c.tiempo_total_sesion,
    c.total_rondas

ORDER BY c.timestamp_inicio ASC;

SELECT
    x.`Session`,
    x.`Key ID`,
    x.`Alice`,
    x.`Result`,
    x.`Bob`

FROM (
    SELECT
        c.id_configuracion AS `Session`,

        a.key_id AS `Key ID`,

        LEFT(a.key_value, 24) AS `Alice`,

        CASE
            WHEN a.key_id IS NULL THEN 'NO ALICE KEY'
            WHEN b.key_id IS NULL THEN 'NO BOB KEY'
            WHEN a.key_value = b.key_value THEN 'EQUAL'
            ELSE 'DIFFERENT'
        END AS `Result`,

        LEFT(b.key_value, 24) AS `Bob`,

        a.created_at AS fecha_alice

    FROM BB84_configuracion c

    LEFT JOIN QKD_keys_alice a
        ON a.created_at >= c.timestamp_inicio
       AND a.created_at <= DATE_ADD(
            c.timestamp_inicio,
            INTERVAL COALESCE(CEIL(c.tiempo_total_sesion) + 60, 3600) SECOND
       )

    LEFT JOIN QKD_keys_bob b
        ON b.key_id = a.key_id

    WHERE c.id_configuracion = ${Session:raw}

    ORDER BY a.created_at DESC
    LIMIT 1
) x;

SELECT
    ROUND(AVG(COALESCE(r.qubits_enviados, 0)), 2) AS `Sent`,
    ROUND(AVG(COALESCE(r.qubits_perdidos, 0)), 2) AS `Lost`,
    ROUND(AVG(COALESCE(r.qubits_recibidos, 0)), 2) AS `Received`,
    ROUND(AVG(COALESCE(r.qubits_no_detectados, 0)), 2) AS `Not detected by Bob`,
    ROUND(AVG(COALESCE(r.qubits_detectados, 0)), 2) AS `Detected by Bob`
FROM BB84_rondas r
WHERE r.id_configuracion = ${Session:raw};

SELECT
    c.id_configuracion AS `Session`,
    c.estado AS `Status`,
    COALESCE(c.total_rondas, COUNT(r.numero_ronda)) AS `Rounds`,
    c.bits_objetivo AS `Target bits`,
    COALESCE(ROUND(c.tiempo_total_sesion, 2), 0) AS `Session time (s)`
FROM BB84_configuracion c
LEFT JOIN BB84_rondas r
    ON r.id_configuracion = c.id_configuracion
WHERE c.id_configuracion = ${Session:raw}
GROUP BY
    c.id_configuracion,
    c.estado,
    c.total_rondas,
    c.bits_objetivo,
    c.tiempo_total_sesion;

SELECT
    CONCAT('R', r.numero_ronda) AS `Round`,

    CASE
        WHEN r.tiempo_ronda_seg IS NULL THEN '-'
        ELSE CONCAT(r.tiempo_ronda_seg, 's')
    END AS `Time`,

    CASE
        WHEN r.ronda_abortada = 2 THEN 'PENDING'

        WHEN r.ronda_abortada = 1
             AND r.qber_verificacion IS NULL
        THEN 'DISCARDED: incomplete'

        WHEN r.ronda_abortada = 1
             AND c.qber_abort_threshold IS NOT NULL
             AND r.qber_verificacion > c.qber_abort_threshold
        THEN 'ABORTED: high QBER'

        WHEN r.ronda_abortada = 1
             AND (
                 r.reconciliacion_hash_match = 0
                 OR r.reconciliacion_ok = 0
             )
        THEN 'DISCARDED: reconciliation error'

        WHEN r.ronda_abortada = 1 THEN 'DISCARDED'

        WHEN r.ronda_abortada = 0
             AND r.reconciliacion_hash_match = 1
        THEN 'ACCEPTED'

        WHEN r.ronda_abortada = 0 THEN 'ACCEPTED'

        ELSE 'UNKNOWN'
    END AS `Round status`,

    COALESCE(r.bits_validos, 0) AS `Contributed bits`,
    COALESCE(r.bits_acumulados, 0) AS `Accumulated bits`,

    ROUND(
        COALESCE(r.bits_acumulados, 0) / NULLIF(c.bits_objetivo, 0) * 100,
        2
    ) AS `Key progress (%)`

FROM BB84_configuracion c
JOIN BB84_rondas r
    ON r.id_configuracion = c.id_configuracion
WHERE c.id_configuracion = ${Session:raw}
ORDER BY r.numero_ronda DESC;

SELECT
    CONCAT('R', r.numero_ronda) AS `Round`,
    COALESCE(r.qubits_enviados, 0) AS `Sent`,
    COALESCE(r.qubits_perdidos, 0) AS `Channel lost`,
    COALESCE(r.qubits_recibidos, 0) AS `Received`,
    COALESCE(r.qubits_no_detectados, 0) AS `Not detected (Bob)`,
    COALESCE(r.qubits_detectados, 0) AS `Detected (Bob)`
FROM BB84_rondas r
WHERE r.id_configuracion = ${Session:raw}
ORDER BY r.numero_ronda ASC;

SELECT 
    ROUND(AVG(r.bits_sifted), 2) AS `Sifted bits`,

    ROUND(
        AVG(
            GREATEST(
                COALESCE(r.qubits_detectados, r.qubits_recibidos) - r.bits_sifted,
                0
            )
        ),
        2
    ) AS `Discarded by bases`,

    ROUND(
        AVG(
            CASE
                WHEN COALESCE(r.qubits_detectados, r.qubits_recibidos) IS NULL
                     OR COALESCE(r.qubits_detectados, r.qubits_recibidos) = 0 THEN NULL
                ELSE
                    GREATEST(
                        COALESCE(r.qubits_detectados, r.qubits_recibidos) - r.bits_sifted,
                        0
                    ) / COALESCE(r.qubits_detectados, r.qubits_recibidos) * 100
            END
        ),
        2
    ) AS `Discarded bases (%)`,

    ROUND(
        AVG(
            CASE
                WHEN r.qubits_enviados IS NULL OR r.qubits_enviados = 0 THEN NULL
                ELSE r.bits_sifted / r.qubits_enviados * 100
            END
        ),
        2
    ) AS `Sifting efficiency (%)`

FROM BB84_rondas r
WHERE r.id_configuracion IN (${Session:csv})
  AND r.bits_sifted IS NOT NULL;

SELECT
    c.id_configuracion AS `Session`,
    COALESCE(MAX(r.numero_ronda), 0) AS `Last round`,
    c.estado AS `Status`,

    COALESCE(MAX(r.bits_acumulados), 0) AS `Accum. Bits`,

    COALESCE(
        ROUND(
            COALESCE(MAX(r.bits_acumulados), 0) / NULLIF(c.bits_objetivo, 0) * 100,
            2
        ),
        0
    ) AS `Progress (%)`,

    IF(
    COALESCE(c.eve_activa, 0) = 1
    AND COALESCE(c.eve_percentage_intercepted, 0) > 0,
    'YES',
    'NO'
) AS `Eve`,

    CONCAT(c.eve_percentage_intercepted, ' %') AS `Eve intercepts (%)`

FROM BB84_configuracion c

LEFT JOIN BB84_rondas r
    ON c.id_configuracion = r.id_configuracion

WHERE c.id_configuracion = (
    SELECT MAX(id_configuracion)
    FROM BB84_configuracion
)

GROUP BY
    c.id_configuracion,
    c.estado,
    c.bits_objetivo,
    c.eve_activa,
    c.eve_percentage_intercepted;

SELECT
    CONCAT('R', r.numero_ronda) AS `Round`,

    COALESCE(r.bits_sifted, 0) AS `Sifted bits`,

    GREATEST(
        COALESCE(r.qubits_detectados, r.qubits_recibidos, 0) - COALESCE(r.bits_sifted, 0),
        0
    ) AS `Discarded by different bases`,

    ROUND(
        CASE
            WHEN COALESCE(r.qubits_detectados, r.qubits_recibidos, 0) = 0 THEN NULL
            ELSE
                GREATEST(
                    COALESCE(r.qubits_detectados, r.qubits_recibidos, 0) - COALESCE(r.bits_sifted, 0),
                    0
                ) / COALESCE(r.qubits_detectados, r.qubits_recibidos, 0) * 100
        END,
        2
    ) AS `Discarded bases (%)`,

    ROUND(
        CASE
            WHEN r.qubits_enviados IS NULL OR r.qubits_enviados = 0 THEN NULL
            ELSE r.bits_sifted / r.qubits_enviados * 100
        END,
        2
    ) AS `Sifting efficiency (%)`

FROM BB84_rondas r
WHERE r.id_configuracion IN (${Session:csv})
  AND r.bits_sifted IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY r.id_configuracion DESC, r.numero_ronda ASC;

options.content: GENERAL SUMMARY
QUANTUM TRANSMISSION
(1) SIFTING
(2) PARAMETER ESTIMATION

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
    ROUND(MAX(r.qber_verificacion), 2) AS `Maximum QBER (%)`,
    ROUND(AVG(r.qber_verificacion), 2) AS `Average QBER (%)`,
    SUM(CASE WHEN r.qber_verificacion > 11 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS `Rounds above threshold`
FROM BB84_rondas r
WHERE r.id_configuracion = ${Session:raw}
  AND r.qber_verificacion IS NOT NULL;

SELECT
    c.pa_metodo AS `PA method`,
    COALESCE(c.pa_input_bits, 0) AS `PA input bits`,
    COALESCE(c.pa_output_bits, 0) AS `PA output bits`,
    COALESCE(c.pa_reduction_bits, 0) AS `PA reduction`,

    CASE
        WHEN k.key_id IS NULL THEN 'NO KEY'
        WHEN k.key_value_alice IS NULL THEN 'NO ALICE KEY'
        WHEN k.key_value_bob IS NULL THEN 'NO BOB KEY'
        WHEN k.key_value_alice = k.key_value_bob THEN 'EQUAL KEYS'
        ELSE 'KEYS DO NOT MATCH'
    END AS `Alice/Bob`

FROM BB84_configuracion c

LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        b.key_id,
        b.key_value AS key_value_bob,
        a.key_value AS key_value_alice,
        b.created_at
    FROM QKD_keys_bob b
    LEFT JOIN QKD_keys_alice a
        ON a.key_id = b.key_id
) k
    ON k.created_at >= c.timestamp_inicio
   AND k.created_at <= DATE_ADD(
        c.timestamp_inicio,
        INTERVAL COALESCE(CEIL(c.tiempo_total_sesion) + 120, 7200) SECOND
   )

WHERE c.id_configuracion = ${Session:raw}

ORDER BY k.created_at DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
    r.numero_ronda AS `Round`,

    ROUND(
        CASE
            WHEN r.qber_verificacion <= 1 THEN r.qber_verificacion * 100
            ELSE r.qber_verificacion
        END,
        2
    ) AS `QBER (%)`,

    ROUND(c.qber_abort_threshold, 2) AS `QBER threshold (%)`

FROM BB84_rondas r
JOIN BB84_configuracion c
    ON c.id_configuracion = r.id_configuracion
WHERE r.id_configuracion = ${Session:raw}
  AND r.qber_verificacion IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY r.numero_ronda ASC;

options.content: (4) CONFIRMACIÓN
(3) ERROR CORRECTION
CLASSICAL POST-PROCESSING

spec.rawSql:
SELECT 
    CONCAT('R', r.numero_ronda) AS `Round`,

CASE
    WHEN r.ronda_abortada = 2 THEN 'PENDING'
    WHEN r.ronda_abortada = 1
         AND r.qber_verificacion IS NULL
    THEN 'DISCARDED: incomplete'
    WHEN r.ronda_abortada = 1
         AND c.qber_abort_threshold IS NOT NULL
         AND r.qber_verificacion > c.qber_abort_threshold
    THEN 'DISCARDED: high QBER'
    WHEN r.ronda_abortada = 1
         AND (
             r.reconciliacion_hash_match = 0
             OR r.reconciliacion_ok = 0
         )
    THEN 'DISCARDED: reconciliation error'
    WHEN r.ronda_abortada = 1 THEN 'DISCARDED'
    WHEN r.ronda_abortada = 0
         AND r.reconciliacion_hash_match = 1
    THEN 'ACCEPTED'
    WHEN r.ronda_abortada = 0 THEN 'ACCEPTED'
    ELSE 'UNKNOWN'
END AS `Round status`,

    COALESCE(r.bits_acumulados, 0) AS `Accumulated Bits`,

    CASE
        WHEN c.bits_objetivo IS NULL OR c.bits_objetivo = 0 THEN NULL
        ELSE ROUND(
            COALESCE(r.bits_acumulados, 0) / c.bits_objetivo * 100,
            2
        )
    END AS `Key Progress (%)`,

    CASE
        WHEN r.qber_verificacion IS NULL THEN NULL
        ELSE ROUND(
            CASE
                WHEN r.qber_verificacion <= 1 THEN r.qber_verificacion * 100
                ELSE r.qber_verificacion
            END,
            2
        )
    END AS `QBER verification (%)`,

    CASE
        WHEN r.tasa_perdida_pct IS NULL THEN NULL
        ELSE ROUND(r.tasa_perdida_pct, 2)
    END AS `Channel loss rate (%)`,

    CASE
        WHEN r.qubits_recibidos IS NULL OR r.qubits_recibidos = 0 THEN NULL
        ELSE ROUND(
            COALESCE(r.qubits_no_detectados, 0) / r.qubits_recibidos * 100,
            2
        )
    END AS `Non-detection rate (%)`,

    CASE
        WHEN r.qber_canal_cuantico IS NULL THEN NULL
        ELSE ROUND(
            CASE
                WHEN r.qber_canal_cuantico <= 1 THEN r.qber_canal_cuantico * 100
                ELSE r.qber_canal_cuantico
            END,
            2
        )
    END AS `Quantum channel error (%)`

FROM BB84_configuracion c

JOIN BB84_rondas r
    ON c.id_configuracion = r.id_configuracion

WHERE c.id_configuracion = (
    SELECT MAX(id_configuracion)
    FROM BB84_configuracion
)

ORDER BY
    r.numero_ronda DESC;

options.content: (5) PRIVACY AMPLIFICATION

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
    CONCAT('R', r.numero_ronda) AS `Round`,

    CASE
        WHEN r.ronda_abortada = 0 THEN 'OK'
        WHEN r.ronda_abortada = 1
             AND r.qber_verificacion IS NOT NULL
             AND c.qber_abort_threshold IS NOT NULL
             AND r.qber_verificacion > c.qber_abort_threshold THEN 'ABORTED QBER'
        WHEN r.ronda_abortada = 1
             AND r.qber_verificacion IS NULL THEN 'DISCARDED BEFORE QBER'
        WHEN r.ronda_abortada = 1 THEN 'DISCARDED'
        WHEN r.ronda_abortada = 2 THEN 'IN PROGRESS'
        ELSE 'PENDING'
    END AS `Status`,

    r.bits_sifted AS `Pre-QBER bits`,
    r.qber_revelados_bits AS `Revealed bits`,

    ROUND(r.qber_verificacion, 2) AS `QBER (%)`,

    CASE
        WHEN r.qber_verificacion IS NULL
             OR c.qber_abort_threshold IS NULL THEN NULL
        WHEN r.qber_verificacion > c.qber_abort_threshold THEN 1
        ELSE 0
    END AS `Threshold exceeded`,

    r.bits_post_qber AS `Post-QBER bits`

FROM BB84_rondas r
JOIN BB84_configuracion c
    ON c.id_configuracion = r.id_configuracion
WHERE r.id_configuracion IN (${Session:csv})
ORDER BY r.id_configuracion DESC, r.numero_ronda DESC;

SELECT
    CONCAT('R', r.numero_ronda) AS `Round`,

    CASE
        WHEN r.reconciliacion_ok = 1 THEN 'OK'
        WHEN r.reconciliacion_ok = 0 THEN 'FAILED'
        WHEN r.ronda_abortada = 1
             AND r.qber_verificacion IS NOT NULL
             AND c.qber_abort_threshold IS NOT NULL
             AND r.qber_verificacion > c.qber_abort_threshold THEN 'HIGH QBER'
        WHEN r.ronda_abortada = 1 THEN 'NOT APPLICABLE'
        ELSE 'PENDING'
    END AS `Reconciliation status`,

    r.bits_post_qber AS `Bits to reconcile`,
        CASE
        WHEN r.reconciliacion_ok IN (0,1)
        THEN r.reconciliacion_correcciones
        ELSE NULL
    END AS `Corrections`,

    CASE
        WHEN r.reconciliacion_ok IN (0,1)
        THEN r.reconciliacion_leakage_bits
        ELSE NULL
    END AS `Leakage bits`,

    CASE
        WHEN r.bits_post_qber > 0
             AND r.reconciliacion_ok IN (0,1)
        THEN ROUND(r.reconciliacion_leakage_bits / r.bits_post_qber * 100, 2)
        ELSE NULL
    END AS `Leakage (%)`

FROM BB84_rondas r
JOIN BB84_configuracion c
    ON c.id_configuracion = r.id_configuracion
WHERE r.id_configuracion IN (${Session:csv})
ORDER BY r.id_configuracion DESC, r.numero_ronda DESC;

SELECT
    CONCAT('R', r.numero_ronda) AS `Round`,

    ROUND(
        CASE
            WHEN r.qber_verificacion <= 1 THEN r.qber_verificacion * 100
            ELSE r.qber_verificacion
        END,
        2
    ) AS `QBER (%)`

FROM BB84_rondas r

JOIN (
    SELECT
        id_configuracion,
        MIN(numero_ronda) AS primera_ronda,
        GREATEST(
            1,
            CEIL(COUNT(*) / 25.0)
        ) AS paso
    FROM BB84_rondas
    WHERE id_configuracion = ${Session:raw}
      AND qber_verificacion IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY id_configuracion
) m
    ON m.id_configuracion = r.id_configuracion

WHERE r.id_configuracion = ${Session:raw}
  AND r.qber_verificacion IS NOT NULL
  AND MOD(r.numero_ronda - m.primera_ronda, m.paso) = 0

ORDER BY r.numero_ronda ASC;

SELECT
    c.reconciliacion_total_correcciones AS `Total corrections`,
    c.reconciliacion_total_leakage_bits AS `Total leakage`,
    c.rondas_abortadas_reconciliacion AS `Failed rounds`,

    ROUND(
        CASE
            WHEN c.pa_input_bits IS NULL OR c.pa_input_bits = 0 THEN NULL
            ELSE c.reconciliacion_total_leakage_bits / c.pa_input_bits * 100
        END,
        2
    ) AS `Leakage over PA input (%)`

FROM BB84_configuracion c
WHERE c.id_configuracion IN (${Session:csv})
ORDER BY c.id_configuracion DESC;

SELECT
  ROUND(AVG(tasa_perdida_pct), 2) AS `Average loss rate (%)`
FROM
  QKD_netsquid.BB84_rondas
WHERE
  id_configuracion = ${Session:raw}
  AND tasa_perdida_pct IS NOT NULL

SELECT
    ROUND(r.qber_verificacion, 2) AS `QBER verification (%)`
FROM BB84_rondas r
WHERE r.id_configuracion = (
    SELECT c2.id_configuracion
    FROM BB84_configuracion c2
    WHERE c2.estado IN ('en_progreso', 'completada')
    ORDER BY
        CASE
            WHEN c2.estado = 'en_progreso' THEN 0
            WHEN c2.estado = 'completada' THEN 1
            ELSE 2
        END,
        c2.id_configuracion DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
AND r.qber_verificacion IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY r.numero_ronda DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
    COALESCE(r.qubits_enviados, 0) AS `Sent`,
    COALESCE(r.qubits_perdidos, 0) AS `Lost in channel`,
    COALESCE(r.qubits_recibidos, 0) AS `Received (channel)`,
    COALESCE(r.qubits_detectados, 0) AS `Detected by Bob`,
    COALESCE(r.qubits_no_detectados, 0) AS `Not Detected by Bob`

FROM (
    SELECT c2.id_configuracion
    FROM BB84_configuracion c2
    ORDER BY
        CASE
            WHEN c2.estado = 'en_progreso' THEN 0
            WHEN c2.estado = 'completada' THEN 1
            ELSE 2
        END,
        c2.id_configuracion DESC
    LIMIT 1
) sesion

LEFT JOIN BB84_rondas r
    ON r.id_configuracion = sesion.id_configuracion
   AND r.numero_ronda = (
        SELECT MAX(r2.numero_ronda)
        FROM BB84_rondas r2
        WHERE r2.id_configuracion = sesion.id_configuracion
   );

SELECT
    COALESCE(r.qubits_perdidos, 0) AS `Lost in channel`,
    COALESCE(r.qubits_perdidos_jitter, 0) AS `Lost jitter`,
    COALESCE(r.errores_measure_faulty, 0) AS `Measurement err.`,
    COALESCE(r.errores_misalignment, 0) AS `Misalignment err.`,
    COALESCE(r.dark_counts_generados, 0) AS `Dark counts`

FROM (
    SELECT c2.id_configuracion
    FROM BB84_configuracion c2
    ORDER BY
        CASE
            WHEN c2.estado = 'en_progreso' THEN 0
            WHEN c2.estado = 'completada' THEN 1
            ELSE 2
        END,
        c2.id_configuracion DESC
    LIMIT 1
) sesion

LEFT JOIN BB84_rondas r
    ON r.id_configuracion = sesion.id_configuracion
   AND r.numero_ronda = (
        SELECT MAX(r2.numero_ronda)
        FROM BB84_rondas r2
        WHERE r2.id_configuracion = sesion.id_configuracion
   );

SELECT
    'DEPOLARIZATION' AS `Parameter`,
    IF(c.usar_depolarizacion = 1, 'Active', 'Inactive') AS `Status`,
    CONCAT(ROUND(c.despolarizacion * 100, 2), ' %') AS `Value`
FROM BB84_configuracion c
WHERE c.id_configuracion IN (${Session:csv});

SELECT
    'DARK COUNTS' AS `Parameter`,
    IF(c.usar_dark_counts_reales = 1, 'Active', 'Inactive') AS `Status`,
    CONCAT(ROUND(c.prob_dark_count_real * 100, 2), ' %') AS `Value`
FROM BB84_configuracion c
WHERE c.id_configuracion IN (${Session:csv})

UNION ALL

SELECT
    'DETECTOR EFFICIENCY' AS `Parameter`,
    IF(c.usar_detector_efficiency = 1, 'Active', 'Inactive') AS `Status`,
    CONCAT(ROUND(c.detector_efficiency * 100, 2), ' %') AS `Value`
FROM BB84_configuracion c
WHERE c.id_configuracion IN (${Session:csv});

SELECT
    'MISALIGNMENT' AS `Parameter`,
    IF(c.usar_misalignment = 1, 'Active', 'Inactive') AS `Status`,
    CONCAT(ROUND(c.misalignment_prob * 100, 2), ' %') AS `Value`
FROM BB84_configuracion c
WHERE c.id_configuracion IN (${Session:csv})

UNION ALL

SELECT
    'BASIC JITTER' AS `Parameter`,
    IF(c.usar_jitter_basico = 1, 'Active', 'Inactive') AS `Status`,
    CONCAT(ROUND(c.jitter_prob_perdida * 100, 2), ' %') AS `Value`
FROM BB84_configuracion c
WHERE c.id_configuracion IN (${Session:csv});

SELECT
    'Eve' AS `Parameter`,

    IF(
    COALESCE(c.eve_activa, 0) = 1
    AND COALESCE(c.eve_percentage_intercepted, 0) > 0,
    'Active',
    'Inactive'
) AS `Status`,

    CONCAT(c.eve_percentage_intercepted, ' %') AS `Intercepted qubits`,

    CONCAT(ROUND(c.eve_error_rate * 100, 2), ' %') AS `Induced error`
FROM BB84_configuracion c
WHERE c.id_configuracion IN (${Session:csv});

spec.name: Session

current.text: #4 — 12/06/2026 01:50 | 40 rounds | QBER threshold=11.00% | Eve=YES (30% intercepted) | completed

spec.query:
SELECT
    CONCAT(
        '#', c.id_configuracion,

        ' — ',
        COALESCE(
            DATE_FORMAT(c.timestamp_inicio, '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i'),
            'no date'
        ),

        ' | ',
        COALESCE(NULLIF(c.total_rondas, 0), r.total_rondas_reales, 0),
        ' rounds',

        ' | QBER threshold=',
        COALESCE(CAST(ROUND(c.qber_abort_threshold, 2) AS CHAR), '-'),
        '%',

        ' | Eve=',
        IF(COALESCE(c.eve_activa, 0) = 1, 'YES', 'NO'),
        ' (',
        COALESCE(CAST(c.eve_percentage_intercepted AS CHAR), '0'),
        '% intercepted)',

        ' | ',
        CASE
            WHEN c.estado = 'completada' THEN 'completed'
            WHEN c.estado = 'abortada' THEN 'aborted'
            WHEN c.estado = 'en_progreso' THEN 'interrupted/in progress'
            ELSE COALESCE(c.estado, 'no status')
        END
    ) AS __text,

    c.id_configuracion AS __value

FROM BB84_configuracion c

LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        id_configuracion,
        COUNT(*) AS total_rondas_reales
    FROM BB84_rondas
    WHERE COALESCE(ronda_abortada, 0) <> 2
    GROUP BY id_configuracion
) r
    ON c.id_configuracion = r.id_configuracion

WHERE c.estado IN ('completada', 'abortada', 'en_progreso')

ORDER BY c.id_configuracion DESC;
spec.rawSql:
SELECT
    CONCAT(
        '#', c.id_configuracion,

        ' — ',
        COALESCE(
            DATE_FORMAT(c.timestamp_inicio, '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i'),
            'no date'
        ),

        ' | ',
        COALESCE(NULLIF(c.total_rondas, 0), r.total_rondas_reales, 0),
        ' rounds',

        ' | QBER threshold=',
        COALESCE(CAST(ROUND(c.qber_abort_threshold, 2) AS CHAR), '-'),
        '%',

        ' | Eve=',
        IF(COALESCE(c.eve_activa, 0) = 1, 'YES', 'NO'),
        ' (',
        COALESCE(CAST(c.eve_percentage_intercepted AS CHAR), '0'),
        '% intercepted)',

        ' | ',
        CASE
            WHEN c.estado = 'completada' THEN 'completed'
            WHEN c.estado = 'abortada' THEN 'aborted'
            WHEN c.estado = 'en_progreso' THEN 'interrupted/in progress'
            ELSE COALESCE(c.estado, 'no status')
        END
    ) AS __text,

    c.id_configuracion AS __value

FROM BB84_configuracion c

LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        id_configuracion,
        COUNT(*) AS total_rondas_reales
    FROM BB84_rondas
    WHERE COALESCE(ronda_abortada, 0) <> 2
    GROUP BY id_configuracion
) r
    ON c.id_configuracion = r.id_configuracion

WHERE c.estado IN ('completada', 'abortada', 'en_progreso')

ORDER BY c.id_configuracion DESC;

spec.definition:
SELECT
    CONCAT(
        '#', c.id_configuracion,

        ' — ',
        COALESCE(
            DATE_FORMAT(c.timestamp_inicio, '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i'),
            'no date'
        ),

        ' | ',
        COALESCE(NULLIF(c.total_rondas, 0), r.total_rondas_reales, 0),
        ' rounds',

        ' | QBER threshold=',
        COALESCE(CAST(ROUND(c.qber_abort_threshold, 2) AS CHAR), '-'),
        '%',

        ' | Eve=',
        IF(COALESCE(c.eve_activa, 0) = 1, 'YES', 'NO'),
        ' (',
        COALESCE(CAST(c.eve_percentage_intercepted AS CHAR), '0'),
        '% intercepted)',

        ' | ',
        CASE
            WHEN c.estado = 'completada' THEN 'completed'
            WHEN c.estado = 'abortada' THEN 'aborted'
            WHEN c.estado = 'en_progreso' THEN 'interrupted/in progress'
            ELSE COALESCE(c.estado, 'no status')
        END
    ) AS __text,

    c.id_configuracion AS __value

FROM BB84_configuracion c

LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        id_configuracion,
        COUNT(*) AS total_rondas_reales
    FROM BB84_rondas
    WHERE COALESCE(ronda_abortada, 0) <> 2
    GROUP BY id_configuracion
) r
    ON c.id_configuracion = r.id_configuracion

WHERE c.estado IN ('completada', 'abortada', 'en_progreso')

ORDER BY c.id_configuracion DESC;
